title: Right Click Fixer
description: Fixes right clicks. With this, you can place torches where you are with your offhand, while placing blocks with your main hand. All without changing slots!
body:
Have you ever been building something and wanted to place a torch, but had to switch to another slot despite having one in your offhand? Well, this mod fixes that! It might save you two seconds over 24 hours!

What this mod does is allow the main hand 'use' function to fail in its normal context (placing a colliding block in an entity-filled space) and then continue to check the offhand for a valid 'use' function (placing a non-colliding block such as a torch)!

### A note: This is not abandoned; I just don't have features I'm looking to add to it. It's doing what I want it to, and it needs no more.

Feel free to include this in mod packs, though I'd prefer you link back to here if you do.
